nodes.name: rvf-federation README
nodes.summary: Project README for rvf-federation crate: privacy-preserving federated RVF transfer learning with PII stripping, differential privacy, FedAvg/FedProx, and Byzantine tolerance per ADR-057.

nodes.name: federation_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for PII stripping, DP noise injection, federated aggregation, and the full export/import pipeline.

nodes.name: bench_pii_strip
nodes.summary: Benchmarks PII detection and stripping at 1, 10, and 100 field scales.

nodes.name: bench_diff_privacy
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Gaussian noise, gradient clipping, and RDP privacy accountant composition.

nodes.name: bench_aggregation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks FedAvg aggregation and Byzantine outlier detection across varying contributor/dimension counts.

nodes.name: bench_export_import
nodes.summary: Benchmarks the full federated export pipeline and the merge of 100 priors.

nodes.name: aggregate.rs
nodes.summary: Federated aggregation server implementing FedAvg, FedProx, and weighted-average strategies with Byzantine outlier filtering.

nodes.name: AggregationStrategy
nodes.summary: Aggregation strategy: FedAvg, FedProx { mu }, or WeightedAverage.

nodes.name: Contribution
nodes.summary: A single contributor's weight vector with quality and trajectory metadata.

nodes.name: FederatedAggregator
nodes.summary: Aggregation server: collects contributions, removes outliers, produces AggregateWeights.

nodes.name: FederatedAggregator::aggregate
nodes.summary: Run Byzantine filtering then dispatch FedAvg/FedProx/WeightedAverage; return AggregateWeights with confidence and loss stats.

nodes.name: diff_privacy.rs
nodes.summary: Differential privacy primitives: Gaussian/Laplace noise injection, gradient clipping, and RDP privacy accountant.

nodes.name: DiffPrivacyEngine
nodes.summary: DP engine adding calibrated Gaussian or Laplace noise with L2 gradient clipping.

nodes.name: DiffPrivacyEngine::gaussian
nodes.summary: Construct a Gaussian DP engine with (epsilon, delta) parameters.

nodes.name: DiffPrivacyEngine::laplace
nodes.summary: Construct a Laplace DP engine for pure epsilon-DP.

nodes.name: DiffPrivacyEngine::add_noise
nodes.summary: Clip then add calibrated Gaussian or Laplace noise; return a DiffPrivacyProof.

nodes.name: PrivacyAccountant
nodes.summary: Renyi DP accountant tracking cumulative privacy loss across 16 alpha orders.

nodes.name: ExportRecord
nodes.summary: Single privacy-consuming export record (epsilon, delta, mechanism, parameter count).

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: FederationError enum with 15 variants covering privacy, validation, signing, witness chain, rate-limit, and aggregation failures.

nodes.name: FederationError
nodes.summary: Errors during federation: privacy budget exhausted, invalid params, segment validation, signature/witness, PII leak, Byzantine outlier, etc.

nodes.name: federation.rs
nodes.summary: Export builder and import merger implementing the ADR-057 transfer protocol with PII stripping, DP noise, and version-aware dampening.

nodes.name: ExportBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder for federated learning exports: extract, PII-strip, DP-noise, assemble manifest.

nodes.name: FederatedExport
nodes.summary: Completed export: manifest, redaction log, privacy proof, and noised learning payloads.

nodes.name: ExportBuilder::build
nodes.summary: Apply quality gate, PII-strip, add DP noise, and assemble the manifest.

nodes.name: ImportMerger
nodes.summary: Validates and merges imports with version-aware dampening on Beta posteriors and weight vectors.

nodes.name: ImportMerger::merge_priors
nodes.summary: Merge remote transfer priors into local with sqrt-dampening for cross-version imports.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root re-exporting aggregate, diff_privacy, federation, pii_strip, policy, types, and error modules.

nodes.name: pii_strip.rs
nodes.summary: Three-stage PII stripping pipeline (detect, redact, attest) with 15 built-in regex rules and pseudonym-preserving replacement.

nodes.name: PiiStripper
nodes.summary: Detect/redact/attest pipeline for PII categories: paths, IPs, emails, API keys, env vars, usernames, phone/SSN/CC.

nodes.name: PiiStripper::strip_fields
nodes.summary: Strip PII from named string fields and produce a SHAKE-256 attested RedactionLog.

nodes.name: policy.rs
nodes.summary: FederationPolicy with allowlists/denylists for segments and domains, quality threshold, rate limit, and privacy budget.

nodes.name: FederationPolicy
nodes.summary: Selective sharing policy with permissive/restrictive presets and segment/domain filters.

nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Federation segment payload types (0x33-0x36) and supporting Beta/TransferPrior/PolicyKernel/CostCurve types.

nodes.name: FederatedManifest
nodes.summary: Segment 0x33: contributor pseudonym, domain, timestamp, privacy budget spent, trajectory count, quality score.

nodes.name: NoiseMechanism
nodes.summary: Noise mechanism discriminator: Gaussian or Laplace.

nodes.name: DiffPrivacyProof
nodes.summary: Segment 0x34: epsilon, delta, mechanism, sensitivity, clipping norm, noise scale.

nodes.name: RedactionEntry
nodes.summary: Single redaction event with category, count, and rule_id.

nodes.name: RedactionLog
nodes.summary: Segment 0x35: redaction entries, pre-redaction SHAKE-256 hash, fields scanned, total redactions.

nodes.name: AggregateWeights
nodes.summary: Segment 0x36: aggregated LoRA deltas with confidence, loss stats, Byzantine filter flag.

nodes.name: BetaParams
nodes.summary: Beta posterior parameters for Thompson Sampling priors with merge/dampen/mean operations.

nodes.name: TransferPriorEntry
nodes.summary: Single context bucket prior: bucket_id, arm_id, Beta params, observation_count.

nodes.name: TransferPriorSet
nodes.summary: Collection of transfer priors from a trained domain with cost EMA.

nodes.name: PolicyKernelSnapshot
nodes.summary: Snapshot of tunable policy kernel knobs with fitness score.

nodes.name: CostCurveSnapshot
nodes.summary: Ordered (step, cost) points for a domain with acceleration factor.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: rvf-import crate manifest depending on rvf-runtime, rvf-types, serde_json, clap, and csv.

nodes.name: rvf-import README
nodes.summary: Data import tool README: JSON, CSV/TSV, and NumPy formats for ingestion into RVF stores.

nodes.name: rvf_import.rs
nodes.summary: Clap-based CLI binary dispatching to json/csv/tsv/npy parsers and writing to a new RvfStore.

nodes.name: Cli
nodes.summary: Clap arg struct with format, input/output paths, dimension, CSV columns, batch size, quiet flag.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point parsing CLI args and delegating to format-specific parsers and import_to_new_store.

nodes.name: csv_import.rs
nodes.summary: CSV/TSV importer with configurable id/vector columns and dimension inference.

nodes.name: CsvConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration: id_column, vector_start, delimiter, has_header, optional dimension.

nodes.name: parse_csv
nodes.summary: Parse CSV from a Read source returning a Vec<VectorRecord>.

nodes.name: parse_csv_file
nodes.summary: Open a CSV file path and parse with the given config.

nodes.name: json.rs
nodes.summary: JSON importer handling array-of-objects and HNSW dump formats with metadata type mapping.

nodes.name: parse_json
nodes.summary: Parse JSON, dispatching on array vs HNSW-dump shape, and convert to VectorRecords.

nodes.name: parse_json_file
nodes.summary: Open a JSON file path and parse it.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root: VectorRecord and ImportResult types plus ingest_records and import_to_new_store helpers.

nodes.name: VectorRecord
nodes.summary: Vector ingestion record: id, vector, metadata entries.

nodes.name: ImportResult
nodes.summary: Summary returned after import: total imported, rejected, and batch count.

nodes.name: ingest_records
nodes.summary: Batch-ingest VectorRecords into an RvfStore with optional progress reporting.

nodes.name: import_to_new_store
nodes.summary: Create a new RvfStore at path with the given dimension and ingest all records.

nodes.name: numpy.rs
nodes.summary: NumPy v1/v2 .npy importer (float32 little-endian only) with shape parsing.

nodes.name: NpyConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration: starting ID for auto-assigned vector IDs.

nodes.name: parse_npy
nodes.summary: Parse a .npy file from a reader, returning VectorRecords with sequential IDs.

nodes.name: parse_npy_file
nodes.summary: Open a .npy file path and parse it.

nodes.name: progress.rs
nodes.summary: ProgressReporter trait with stderr and collecting implementations for tests.

nodes.name: ProgressReporter
nodes.summary: Trait for receiving per-batch progress callbacks.

nodes.name: StderrProgress
nodes.summary: ProgressReporter writing a percentage line to stderr.

nodes.name: CollectingProgress
nodes.summary: ProgressReporter capturing reports into a Mutex-protected Vec for assertions.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: rvf-index crate manifest: progressive HNSW indexing, std and simd features.

nodes.name: rvf-index README
nodes.summary: Tiered Layer A/B/C HNSW indexing for hot/warm/cold vectors with progressive build.

nodes.name: builder.rs
nodes.summary: Index builders for the full HNSW graph and per-tier LayerA/B/C structures with incremental insertion.

nodes.name: build_full_index
nodes.summary: Build a full HnswGraph from a VectorStore with the given config.

nodes.name: build_layer_a
nodes.summary: Build the hot-tier LayerA in-memory full-precision graph for the given node IDs.

nodes.name: build_layer_b
nodes.summary: Build the warm-tier LayerB quantized mmap layer for non-hot node IDs.

nodes.name: build_layer_c
nodes.summary: Build the cold-tier LayerC compressed on-disk metadata.

nodes.name: incremental_insert
nodes.summary: Insert a new node into an existing HnswGraph without a full rebuild.

nodes.name: codec.rs
nodes.summary: Index segment encoding/decoding with varint + delta encoding and 8-byte alignment padding.

nodes.name: IndexSegHeader
nodes.summary: Header for an encoded index segment.

nodes.name: NodeAdjacency
nodes.summary: Adjacency list for a single HNSW node.

nodes.name: IndexSegData
nodes.summary: Decoded index segment payload: header plus adjacency entries.

nodes.name: encode_varint
nodes.summary: Encode a u64 as LEB128-style varint into a Vec<u8>.

nodes.name: decode_varint
nodes.summary: Decode a varint and return the value plus byte count consumed.

nodes.name: delta_encode
nodes.summary: Delta-encode a sorted slice of u64 IDs for compact storage.

nodes.name: delta_decode
nodes.summary: Reconstruct original sorted IDs from a delta-encoded slice.

nodes.name: encode_index_seg
nodes.summary: Encode an IndexSegData to bytes with header, adjacency, and alignment padding.

nodes.name: decode_index_seg
nodes.summary: Decode an index segment from bytes back into IndexSegData.

nodes.name: CodecError
nodes.summary: Error variants for index segment encoding/decoding failures.

nodes.name: distance.rs
nodes.summary: Distance metrics (L2, cosine, dot) with scalar implementations and AVX2/NEON SIMD modules.

nodes.name: l2_distance
nodes.summary: Public L2 distance dispatcher selecting scalar or SIMD implementation.

nodes.name: cosine_distance
nodes.summary: Public cosine distance dispatcher.

nodes.name: dot_product
nodes.summary: Public dot product dispatcher.

nodes.name: l2_distance_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD-only L2 entry point.

nodes.name: cosine_distance_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD-only cosine entry point.

nodes.name: dot_product_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD-only dot product entry point.

nodes.name: hnsw.rs
nodes.summary: HNSW graph implementation with configurable layer count, M, ef parameters, and BTreeMap-based adjacency.

nodes.name: HnswConfig
nodes.summary: HNSW build/search configuration (M, ef_construction, ef_search, level multiplier).

nodes.name: HnswLayer
nodes.summary: Single HNSW layer holding node-to-neighbor adjacency.

nodes.name: HnswGraph
nodes.summary: Multi-layer HNSW graph with entry point, layer stack, and insert/search routines.
